---
title: "Open Day Web App Demo: Turning Data into Interactive Stories"
date: 2026-05-21
categories: ["Apps", "Web", "Demo"]
description: "A showcase of my open-day web app demo for interactive, data-driven exploration."
aliases: ["/posts/OpenDay-WebApp-Demo/"]
image: /assets/images/openday.png
---

# Open Day Web App Demo

**Data to Decision** is an interactive, game-based web experience showing how statistics and optimisation drive real-world decisions.

Built for Curtin Open Day 2026.

Instead of a traditional webpage or slide deck, this demo is designed as a hands-on experience where visitors make choices, observe outcomes, and improve decisions using data.

---

## What Is This?

This is not a traditional webpage. It is an interactive learning experience that helps visitors understand the journey:

**From guessing -> data -> insight -> optimisation**

Visitors can:
- make decisions in a simple real-world scenario,
- see how outcomes change,
- and learn how data improves decisions.

---

## The Experience

### Run Your Own Ice Cream Shop
A short interactive game where users:
- choose what to sell,
- observe customer behaviour,
- learn from data,
- adjust their strategy,
- and improve performance over time.

### What You Will Learn
This demo introduces key ideas from statistics and optimisation:
- data collection,
- uncertainty,
- statistical insight,
- exploration vs exploitation,
- decision optimisation.

---

## Why This Matters

Statistics is not just mathematics. It is about making better decisions in uncertain environments.

This experience shows how data is used in:
- business,
- healthcare,
- technology,
- and everyday decision-making.

---

## Try It Yourself

- Website: [https://stat-opt-demo.netlify.app/](https://stat-opt-demo.netlify.app/)
- GitHub repository: [https://github.com/jeromecy/stat-optim-demo](https://github.com/jeromecy/stat-optim-demo)

Scan the QR code at open day to play on your phone.
